Document:
# Core Rule 6 - Do not discuss or evade bans [color=SlateGray][italic]Revision A, 2025-10-11[/italic][/color]
This is a zero-tolerance rule.
You may discuss bans only at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/ban-appeals/appeals-game/40
Unless you are completing preexisting objectives, do not act as or accept banned jobs and roles.
Sharing or using other accounts is potential ban evasion and prohibited. Penalties equally apply to all users of the penalized account.
# Switching accounts You may change your username at https://account.spacestation14.com/Identity/Account/Manage
As soon as you create a new account, you must notify admins of your previous username at https://forum.spacestation14.com/c/general/help/46
## Examples [color=#449944]Appropriate:[/color] - Refusing promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Suiciding or spectating after revolutionary conversion while banned from revolutionary roles.
[color=#994444]Prohibited:[/color] - Accepting promotion to or door access for Head of Security while banned from security or command roles. - Playing after revolutionary conversion while banned from revolutionary roles.
